subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of God, which hath been sent down in truth, wherein mention is made of the servant who was martyred in His path and whom the divine fragrances overtook [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الله قد نزل بالحق و فیه یذکر عبد الذی استشهد فی سبیله و اخذته نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @eulogies; reminiscences, @suffering and imprisonment
